title: Voren (disambiguation)
content:
'''Voren''', '''Vo'ren''', and '''Vor'en''' were similar first names used by [[human]] [[Gender|males]]. People with these names included:

===Canon===
*'''[[Voren Na'al]]''', [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel]] [[historian]]

===Legends===
*'''[[Voren Na'al/Legends|Voren Na'al]]''', [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Historian/Legends|historian]]
*'''[[Darth Voren]]''', AKA '''Voren Renstaal''', [[Sith apprentice/Legends|Sith apprentice]] to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]
*'''[[Vo'ren Faalo/Legends|Vo'ren Faalo]]''', [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]
*'''[[Vor'en Kurn]]''', [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]]

{{Disambig}}
